title: Naldurg Fort
tagline: Naldurg Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Naldurg Fort is a historic fort in Naldurg town of Dharashiv district in Maharashtra state of India.
overview.description: Naldurg Fort is a historic fort in Naldurg town of Dharashiv district in Maharashtra state of India. Naldurg Fort is named after Nalraja who built the fort in medieval architectural style. The unique feature of the fort is that it encloses a knoll of basalt rock which juts out into the valley of the small Bori River and a long fortification wall with many bastions. The Naldurg fort is one of the important ground forts in the Marathwada region.

topPlaces.name: Naldurg
topPlaces.description: Naldurg is a historic city and municipal council located in the Dharashiv district of the state of Maharashtra, India. It is known for its prominent Naldurg Fort, one of the most impressive medieval forts in the region, built during the Bahmani and Adil Shahi periods.

items.note: Naldurg is a historic city and municipal council located in the Dharashiv district of the state of Maharashtra, India. It is known for its prominent Naldurg Fort, one of the most impressive medieval forts in the region, built during the Bahmani and Adil Shahi periods.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Naldurg Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Naldurg Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Naldurg Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (186 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (45 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Naldurg Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Naldurg Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Naldurg Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Naldurg Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
